pr.title: Record: Int6 MLP3x + STE QAT + Sliding Window (val_bpb=1.1594)

output.summary: Int6 per-row quant with zstd frees bytes to train a 3x MLP via STE QAT while sliding-window eval and fp16 tied embeddings preserve scoring quality.
techniques: - Int6 per-row quant + zstd-22 compression frees budget for a 3x MLP expansion
- STE fake-int6 quant-aware training prepares weights for aggressive 6-bit deployment
- Sliding-window stride-64 eval with fp16 tied embeddings keeps scoring quality high
